title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Google DeepMind researchers at the University of Cambridge use AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to accelerate discovery of bacterial defense mechanisms against antibiotics. The AI tools compress a process that previously took years into minutes, enabling faster identification of insights to counter antimicrobial resistance.
